properties.Script Body:
def ff = session.get()
if (!ff) return

try {
    def db        = SQL.myPool
    def moveIdStr = ff.attributes['move_id']?.trim()

    if (!moveIdStr || moveIdStr == '' || moveIdStr == 'null') {
        log.error('No move_id')
        session.transfer(ff, REL_FAILURE)
        return
    }

    def moveId
    try { moveId = moveIdStr.toLong() }
    catch(ex) {
        log.error('Invalid move_id: ' + moveIdStr)
        session.transfer(ff, REL_FAILURE)
        return
    }

    def balRow = db.firstRow("""
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(debit),0)  AS total_debit,
            COALESCE(SUM(credit),0) AS total_credit,
            ABS(COALESCE(SUM(debit),0) - COALESCE(SUM(credit),0)) AS net
        FROM account_move_line
        WHERE move_id = ?""",
        [moveId])

    def net = balRow?.net?.toDouble() ?: 0.0

    if (net > 0.01) {
        log.warn('IMBALANCED move ' + moveId + ' net=' + net + ' — posting anyway for migration')
    }

    db.executeUpdate("""
        UPDATE account_move
        SET state = 'posted',
            posted_before = true,
            write_date = NOW()
        WHERE id = ? AND state = 'draft'""",
        [moveId])

    db.executeUpdate("""
        UPDATE account_move_line
        SET parent_state = 'posted',
            write_date = NOW()
        WHERE move_id = ?""",
        [moveId])

    log.info('Posted move ' + moveId + ' net=' + net)

    ff = session.putAttribute(ff, 'post_status', 'posted')
    ff = session.putAttribute(ff, 'net_balance',  net.toString())
    session.transfer(ff, REL_SUCCESS)

} catch(e) {
    log.error('Post failed: ' + e.message, e)
    ff = session.putAttribute(ff, 'error', e.message)
    session.transfer(ff, REL_FAILURE)
}

properties.Custom Text:
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "generated": "2026-05-04T00:00:00.000Z",
  "description": "Tally to Odoo column mapping config — used by NiFi UpdateAttribute + ExecuteGroovyScript",
  "pipeline_info": {
    "source_system": "Tally ERP 9 / TallyPrime",
    "target_system": "Odoo 17+",
    "db_type": "PostgreSQL",
    "insert_method": "COPY FROM STDIN (bulk)",
    "idempotency": "XID checked in ir_model_data before insert",
    "currency": "INR",
    "phase_order": ["phase_1", "phase_2", "phase_3", "phase_4"],
    "staging_csvs": {
      "01_taxes.csv": "GST taxes",
      "02_coa.csv": "Chart of Accounts",
      "03_contacts.csv": "Customers and Vendors",
      "04_products.csv": "Products",
      "05_opening_balances.csv": "Opening balance journal entries",
      "06_sales_invoices.csv": "Sales invoices (SI/xxxx)",
      "07_purchase_bills.csv": "Purchase bills (PB/xxxx)",
      "08_journal_entries.csv": "Manual journal entries (JV/xxxx)"
    }
  },
  "transform_glossary": {
    "parse_indian_number": "Convert Indian formatted number like 1,23,456.78 to float",
    "parse_tally_date": "Convert Tally date formats to ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD",
    "strip_whitespace": "Remove leading and trailing whitespace",
    "clean_gstin": "Validate and normalise 15-character GSTIN",
    "clean_phone": "Strip non-numeric characters from phone numbers",
    "bracket_to_negative": "Convert bracket amount (50,000) to negative float -50000.0",
    "dr_cr_sign": "Apply DR/CR column value to determine sign of amount",
    "jsonb_wrap_en_us": "Wrap value as JSONB: {en_US: value} — required for Odoo 17+ name columns",
    "jsonb_wrap_company": "Wrap value as JSONB: {company_id: value} — for code_store and standard_price",
    "generate_xid": "Generate External ID using make_*_ext_id() from config.py",
    "resolve_fk_xid": "Resolve External ID string to integer DB id via ir_model_data lookup",
    "resolve_fk_name": "Resolve name string to integer DB id via direct DB table lookup",
    "normalize_state_name": "Normalise Indian state name aliases to canonical form",
    "normalize_uom": "Normalise unit of measure name to Odoo standard UOM name",
    "slugify": "Convert string to URL-safe slug for use in External IDs"
  },
  "env_variables": {
    "$ENV:PG_COMPANY_ID": "Integer id of the Odoo company — default 1",
    "$ENV:PG_ADMIN_UID": "Integer id of the Odoo admin user — default 1",
    "$ENV:MIGRATION_MODULE": "Module name for ir_model_data XIDs — default __migration__",
    "$CACHE:currency_id_inr": "Integer id of INR currency — resolved at runtime from res_currency",
    "$CACHE:company_id": "Integer id of res_company — resolved at runtime",
    "$CACHE:country_id_in": "Integer id of India in res_country — resolved at runtime"
  },
  "tables": {
    "account_tax_group": {
      "_meta": {
        "phase": "1",
        "source_file": "01_taxes.csv",
        "description": "Tax groups (GST, TDS, TCS) derived from tax names in 01_taxes.csv"
      },
      "fields": {
        "id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["generate_xid"],
          "note": "DB sequence id reserved via fetch_next_ids(); XID registered in ir_model_data"
        },
        "name": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "jsonb",
          "source_col": "name",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["strip_whitespace", "jsonb_wrap_en_us"],
          "note": "Derived from tax name via derive_group_name(); values: GST, TDS, TCS, Other Taxes"
        },
        "sequence": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": 10,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always 10"
        },
        "company_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$CACHE:company_id",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "From PreLoadCache.company_id (resolved from PG_COMPANY_ID)"
        },
        "country_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$CACHE:country_id_in",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "From PreLoadCache.country_id (India, resolved from TARGET_COUNTRY_CODE=IN)"
        },
        "tax_payable_account_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL in migration; can be linked post-migration"
        },
        "tax_receivable_account_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL in migration"
        },
        "advance_tax_payment_account_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL in migration"
        },
        "create_uid": {
          "required": true,

          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Odoo admin user id from PG_ADMIN_UID env var"
        },
        "write_uid": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$ENV:PG_ADMIN_UID",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Odoo admin user id from PG_ADMIN_UID env var"
        }
      }
    },
    "account_tax": {

    "res_partner": {
      "_meta": {
        "phase": "2",
        "source_file": "03_contacts.csv",
        "description": "Customers and vendors from Tally ledger masters"
      },
      "fields": {
        "id": {
          "required": true,

          "required": true,

        },
        "complete_name": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "varchar",

          "hardcode": null,

        "type": {
          "required": false,

          "source_col": "tally_group",

          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "tally_group",
          "hardcode": null,

        },
        "company_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,

          "transforms": [],

        },
        "currency_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$CACHE:currency_id_inr",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "NOT NULL; always INR from PreLoadCache.currency_id"
        },

          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "Partner/id",

        },

          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "Set equal to partner_id when partner is resolved"

        "date": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "date",
          "source_col": "Date",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_tally_date"],
          "note": "NOT NULL; falls back to MIGRATION_DATE env var if blank"
        },
        "invoice_date": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "date",
          "source_col": "Invoice Bill Date",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_tally_date"],
          "note": "Falls back to date if blank"
        },
        "invoice_date_due": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "date",
          "source_col": "Due Date",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_tally_date"],
          "note": "NULL if blank"
        },
        "ref": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "varchar",
          "source_col": "Reference",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["strip_whitespace"],
          "note": "Voucher number from Reference column; NULL if blank"
        },
        "name": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "varchar",
          "source_col": "Reference",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["strip_whitespace"],
          "note": "Set to ref if available; otherwise /"
        },
        "narration": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "text",
          "source_col": "narration",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["strip_whitespace"],
          "note": "Free-text narration/memo; NULL if blank"
        },
        "payment_state": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "varchar",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "not_paid for invoice types (out_invoice/in_invoice/refunds); NULL for entry type"
        },
        "always_tax_exigible": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "boolean",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": false,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always false"
        },
        "create_uid": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$ENV:PG_ADMIN_UID",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": null
        },
        "write_uid": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$ENV:PG_ADMIN_UID",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": null
        }
      }
    },
    "account_move_line": {
      "_meta": {
        "phase": "4",
        "source_file": "05_opening_balances.csv / 06_sales_invoices.csv / 07_purchase_bills.csv / 08_journal_entries.csv",
        "description": "Invoice line items and journal items; parent_state backfilled to posted by run_phase4.py"
      },
      "fields": {
        "id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["generate_xid"],
          "note": "DB sequence id; NOT registered in ir_model_data"
        },
        "move_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "NOT NULL CASCADE; resolved from move_xid_map by parent header xid_name"
        },
        "journal_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL during insert; populated by DB trigger from move"
        },
        "company_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$CACHE:company_id",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "From PreLoadCache.company_id"
        },
        "company_currency_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$CACHE:currency_id_inr",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "INR from PreLoadCache.currency_id"
        },
        "account_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "Invoice Lines/Account*",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_name"],
          "note": "Resolved from account code via _build_account_code_cache() (code_store JSONB lookup); fallback to ir_model_data XID"
        },
        "currency_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$CACHE:currency_id_inr",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "NOT NULL; always INR"
        },
        "partner_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "Partner/id",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK SET NULL; resolved from Partner/id column if present"
        },
        "product_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL; product-line linking is not done in direct DB migration"
        },
        "product_uom_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL"
        },
        "tax_line_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL"
        },
        "tax_repartition_line_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL"
        },
        "tax_group_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL"
        },
        "group_tax_id": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL"
        },
        "display_type": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "varchar",
          "source_col": "Invoice Lines/Label",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "NOT NULL; inferred by _infer_display_type(): rounding/tax/product based on label keywords"
        },
        "sequence": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Sequential integer within each move batch"
        },
        "date": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "date",
          "source_col": "Date",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_tally_date"],
          "note": "NULL if blank"
        },
        "date_maturity": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "date",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL"
        },
        "name": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "varchar",
          "source_col": "Invoice Lines/Label",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["strip_whitespace"],
          "note": "Line label / description; NULL if blank"
        },
        "ref": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "varchar",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always NULL"
        },
        "debit": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": "Journal Items/Debit",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_indian_number"],
          "note": "Always >= 0; from explicit debit column or derived from amount and move_type"
        },
        "credit": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": "Journal Items/Credit",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_indian_number"],
          "note": "Always >= 0; debit * credit = 0 enforced"
        },
        "balance": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Computed as debit - credit"
        },
        "quantity": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": "Invoice Lines/Quantity",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_indian_number"],
          "note": "Defaults to 1.0 if absent"
        },
        "price_unit": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": "Invoice Lines/Unit Price",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_indian_number"],
          "note": "Defaults to 0.0 if absent"
        },
        "price_subtotal": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Computed as quantity * price_unit * (1 - discount/100)"
        },
        "price_total": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Set equal to price_subtotal (no tax lines added in direct DB mode)"
        },
        "discount": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": "Invoice Lines/Discount",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["parse_indian_number"],
          "note": "Discount percentage; defaults to 0.0"
        },
        "amount_currency": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "numeric",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Set equal to balance (single-currency INR migration)"
        },
        "reconciled": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "boolean",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": false,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always false at insert time"
        },
        "parent_state": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "varchar",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "draft",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Inserted as draft; backfilled to posted by run_phase4.py after all move headers and lines are committed"
        },
        "is_storno": {
          "required": false,
          "type": "boolean",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": false,
          "transforms": [],
          "note": "Always false"
        },
        "create_uid": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$ENV:PG_ADMIN_UID",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": null
        },
        "write_uid": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": null,
          "hardcode": "$ENV:PG_ADMIN_UID",
          "transforms": [],
          "note": null
        }
      }
    },
    "res_partner_res_partner_category_rel": {
      "_meta": {
        "phase": "2",
        "source_file": "03_contacts.csv",
        "description": "Junction linking partners to their categories; composite PK is (category_id, partner_id)"
      },
      "fields": {
        "category_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "tally_group",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK to res_partner_category.id; CASCADE; FIRST in PK; resolved from category_xid_map"
        },
        "partner_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "name",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK to res_partner.id; CASCADE; SECOND in PK; resolved from partner_xid_map"
        }
      }
    },
    "product_taxes_rel": {
      "_meta": {
        "phase": "3",
        "source_file": "04_products.csv",
        "description": "Junction linking product templates to their sales taxes; PK is (prod_id, tax_id)"
      },
      "fields": {
        "prod_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "name",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK to product_template.id; CASCADE; FIRST in PK; resolved from template_xid_map"
        },
        "tax_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "tax_ids",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK to account_tax.id; CASCADE; resolved from tax_xid_map using {name}_sale XID format; column detected via tax_ids/sales_tax/tax_name/tax"
        }
      }
    },
    "product_supplier_taxes_rel": {
      "_meta": {
        "phase": "3",
        "source_file": "04_products.csv",
        "description": "Junction linking product templates to their purchase taxes; PK is (prod_id, tax_id)"
      },
      "fields": {
        "prod_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "name",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK to product_template.id; CASCADE; FIRST in PK; resolved from template_xid_map"
        },
        "tax_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "supplier_tax_ids",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK to account_tax.id; CASCADE; resolved from tax_xid_map using {name}_purchase XID format; column detected via supplier_tax_ids/purchase_tax"
        }
      }
    },
    "product_tag_product_template_rel": {
      "_meta": {
        "phase": "3",
        "source_file": "04_products.csv",
        "description": "Junction linking product templates to product tags; PK is (product_template_id, product_tag_id)"
      },
      "fields": {
        "product_template_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "name",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK to product_template.id; CASCADE; resolved from template_xid_map"
        },
        "product_tag_id": {
          "required": true,
          "type": "integer",
          "source_col": "product_tag",
          "hardcode": null,
          "transforms": ["resolve_fk_xid"],
          "note": "FK to product_tag.id; CASCADE; resolved from tag_xid_map"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

properties.Script Body: import MappingResolver

labels.label: Loading Data into account_account(Charts of Account) From 02_coa.csv
